title: 200m Christmas String 2mm, Green Red and White Twine String Natural Brown Butchers Twine, for Christmas Decorations Gift Wrapping Crafts Cooking (4 Coloured)
features: 💕【4 Rolls of Twine in Different Colors】3 rolls of multi-colored cotton twine (red and white string, green and white twine, red and green twine) + 1 roll of brown twine string, each roll is 50m/164 feet long, 200m/656 feet in total, 2mm in diameter

💕【Eco Friendly - Biodegradable, Not Easy to Fade】 These Coloured Christmas String and jute twine are made of natural materials, 100% biodegradable and environmentally friendly, easy to recycle, reusable; environmentally friendly dyeing, bright colors, not easy to fade

💕【Strong and Durable】This Christmas string twine lovely and soft but also sturdy, is perfect for wrapping parcel, presents or classy decoration to add a lovely look to your projects to really set them apart

💕【Perfect for Christmas Decorations】The twine string it's is lovely bright colors, great for Christmas presents wrapping, wrap gift presents tags, Christmas tree hang decorations and advent calendars gift wrapping accessories, Christmas craft supplies

💕【Versatile Use】Also can use to tie cookies, cake and pastry boxes, as well as for homemade jams to attach the labels, for all sorts of arts and DIY crafts, use in baking through to gardening and packing parcels etc
description: Great Variety Pack: This is a perfect Christmas multi pack, you will get 4 rolls string: red and white string, Green and White String, red green and white string, and Jute rope, each 50m. Easy to Use: Packed on a coil, the Christmas string twine will not intertwined with each other, you can cut freely according to the length you want. An Eco friendly Christmas Wrapping Option: This string is great for eco-friendly Christmas present wrapping, is 100% natural, use combined with recyclable wrapping paper it becomes almost zero waste. Get this premium set of jute twine and bakers twine from OEMG and start adding the right touches to all your DIY art, craft and custom projects. This soft but heavy duty twine string is perfect for wrapping parcel, presents or classy decoration to add a rustic look to your projects to really set them apart.
